title: Changes to the codes of practice for schedule 7 and schedule 3
body: "This consultation seeks views on the changes the Home Office proposes making to the codes of practice for schedule 7 to the Terrorism Act 2000 and schedule 3 to the Counter-Terrorism and Border Security Act 2019.  We welcome feedback from:   UK police forces who exercise the powers under schedules 7 and 3 interest groups members of the public  "
